upasargachandrika.example_text: 'SrIrasIti pArSvena vasAhomaM prayOti' (Apa॰SrO॰7.8.25.4) prayOti Gawwayati loqayati
'vizRoH stUpo'sIti karzannivAhavanIyaM prati prastaramapAdatte nodyOti na prayOti' (Apa॰SrO॰2.3.8.5) na prayOti=na purastAt sArayati
'prayuto na pAtAraH' (grAvARaH) prayutaH=GawwayitAraH prapUrvasya yOteH kvipi rUpam
'iti (vapAM) prayOti' (BA॰SrO॰7.14.12) prayOti apanayati utKidati
'yuvA prayOti karmARi (ni॰4.19) prayOti sammiSrayati avivekitvAt
'prayuvatI gacCati' (ni॰9.26) '
nakizwaM karmaRA naSanna prayozat (f॰8.31.17) prayozat=pfTakkaroti=ekataH karoti
'DenuM carantIM prayutAmagopAm' (f॰3.57.1) vA॰saM॰11.75 ityatra prayutAM viyuktAM vrajAd BrazwAmAha
'rAtriM rAtrimaprayAvam' (aTarva॰19.55.1) aprayAvamiti sAyaRaDftaH pAWaH aprayAtamiti pAWAntaram aprayAvam=apracCidyA iha prayurviSleze vartata ityaBipretaM sAyaRasya
'svapnaScedanftasya prayotA' (f॰786.6)
'pArSvena vasAhomaM prayOti' (tE0 saM0 631157) hotavyAM vasAM prayOti Aloqayati bODAyanaSrOtasUtre (49) pyeza granTaH sTitaH
'yamunA prayuvatI gacCatIti vA' (ni0 6261) pustake Dftacaro'yaN granTaH arTo na nirdizwaH sa nirdiSyate prayuvatI saMBiSrayantI svAni jalAni
'sarvARi grAmyARyAraRyAnyAjyena prayutya' (vArAhaSrO0 2249) prayutya saMmiSrya
'svapnaSca nedanftasya prayotA' (f0 7866) pustake nyastapUrvamapIdamarTanirdeSAya punardIyate prayotA prerayitA prayoktA
'yamunA prayuvatI gacCatIti vA praviyutaM gacCatIti vA' (ni॰9.26.1) prayuvatI prakarzeRa svAnyudakAnyABirnadIBirmiSrayantI praviyutaM stimitaM yaTA syAttaraNgastaTetyarTa iti durgaH
'apa svasAraM sanutaryuyoti' (f॰1.92.11) apayuyoti=viyOti=viyuNkte svasAramuzasam
'janayatyE tvA saMyomi' (vA॰saM॰1.22) miSrayAmItyAha
'yAmeva mfdaM tatra saMyOti' (Sa॰brA॰6.5.1.3) ukto'rTaH
'janayatyE tvA saMyOmIti saMyutya' (Apa॰SrO॰1.8.14.5) saMyutya=pizwamapaSca melayitvA
'praRItABirhavIMzi saMyOti' (Sa॰brA॰) praRItApAtrasTABiradDiH puroqASapizwaM melayati
'saMyadojo yuvate viSvamABiH' (f॰5.32.10) saMyuvate=saMyunakti
'na ca kAYcana kAYcanasadmacitiM na kapiH SiKinA SiKinA samayOt' (Bawwi॰10.5) samayOt=samayojayat=samabaDnAt
'mudA sayuhi kAkutsTam' (Bawwi॰20.16) ukto'rTaH
aSvaM raTaraSmisaMyutam (raGu॰3.42) saMyutam=saMyuktam
'saM samidyuvase vfzannagne viSvAnyarya A' (tE0 saM0 26114) saMyuvase rASI karozi (BakteByaH pradAtum)
'iti navanItena pARI pralipya sarvAnkeSAnsamprayOti' (vA0 gf0 167) samprayOti=sampiRqayati=saMhatAn karoti
'avayuvatI' (ni0 411) viyuYjAne
'yayoranyA'GAni dvezAMsyavayAvayati' (ni0 9421) avayAvayati avamiSrayati apanayati parAkaroti apAkaroti
'niryuvARo aSastIH' (f0 4482) niryuvARaH pfTak kurvARaH=apAkurvan
'niryuvARo aSastIrniryutvA~ indrasAraTiH' (f0 4482) apanayannityarTaH
'vi koSaM maDyamaM yuva' (f0 91089) viyuva=viyuhi=visinu=udGAwaya
'na ma indreRa saKyaM vi yozat' (f0 2188)
'ihEva staM mA vi yOzwam' (f0 108542) mA viyOzwaM viyuktO mA sma BUtam
'na sa rAyA SaSamAno vi yozat' (f0 429) ukto'rTaH
'aDA sa vIrErdaSaBirvi yUyAH' (f0 710415) viyUyAH=viyUyAt puruzavyatyayaH viyuto vipfkto viyukto BUyAdityarTaH
'iheha vatsErviyutA yadAsan' (f0 53010) viyutA viprayuktAH
'na vayaM rAyaspozeRa viyOzma' (vA0 saM0 422) asakfduktacaro'rTaH loke yOtirudAttaH tena mA viyAvizmeti syAt
'aSezErviyutaM dozEraSezEH saMyutaM guREH' (bf0 Slo0 saM0 5128) viyutaM viyuktam
'anyonyaM sma vyatiyutaH SabdASabdEstu BIzaRAn' (Bawwi0 86) vyatiyutaH=miSrayataH anyonyam anyo'nyasya
'yuktaH sarvEH padBiH samamAyute' (Sa0 brA0 13276) samamAyute sAkaM karzati
'viSvasya yo mana Ayuyuve' (f0 11381) Ayuyuve Akarzati harati Izwe
'sa (pavamAnaH) maDva Ayuvate vevijAnaH' (f0 9772) Ayuvate Adatte
'A jAyA yuvate patim' (f0 11052)
'A raSmIn deva yuvase svaSvaH' (tE0 brA0 27162) raSmInAyuvase pragrahAnyacCasi
'rAyaspozaM tvamasmaByaM gavAM kulmiM jIvasa Ayuvasva' (tE0 saM0 2452) Ayuvasva dehi vitara pradiSa
'A svamadma yuvamAnaH' (f0 1582) AyuvamAna AdadAnaH gahlAnaH
'vayAMsi samAsaM pakzAvAyuvAnAni patanti' (Sa0 brA0 41226) AyuvAnAni vistArayanti AyAmayanti
'siMhaSArdUlamAtaNgavarAharkzamfgAyutaM vanam' (BA0 6439) AyutaM yuktam AcitaM nicitam
'AyutaM pitFRAm' (E0 brA0 13) vilInArDamAyutaM tu navanItaM yato Gftam iti zaqguruSizyodDftaH SlokAMSaH
'AyuzA vE devA asurAnAyuvata' (paYca0 brA0 1632) Ayuvata Ayuvan vyayojayan
'AjyaM vE devAnAM suraBiGftaM manuzyARAmAyutaM pitFRAM navanItaM garBARAm' (E0 brA0 13) AyutamIzad vilInam
'BojanaM nyatraye yuyotam' (f0 7685) niyuyotam prApayatam (atrim)
'rayi ni vAjaM SrutyaM yuvasva' (f0 759) ukto'rTaH
'tasmE SatrUn ni svazwrAnyuvati hanti vftram BrAtfvyasya paSUnniyuvate' (tE0 saM0 2623) niyuvate vaSe karoti
'ni no rayiM suBojasaM yuvasva ni vIraM gabyamaSvyaM ca rADaH' (vA0 saM0 2727) niyuvasva niyuhi dehi nipUrvo yOtirdAnArTa ityuvawaH
'vipo na dyumnA ni yuve janAnAm' (f0 81933)
'raSanayA niyUya' (f0 107010) niyUya=niyutya badDvA
'niyuvAnA niyutaH spArhavIrA' (f0 7915) niyuvAnO niyuvantO saMmiSrayantO yuYjAnO
'su maDu maDunABiyoDi' (aTarva0 523) suzWu aBito miSrayetyarTaH
'ut pUzaRaM yuvAmahe'BISU~riva sAraTiH' (f0 6576) udyuvAmahe udyojayAmaH
'mahInAM payo si iti darBapuYjIlAByAM navanItamudyOti' (Apa0 SrO0 102612) udyOti udyAcCati
'vizRoH stUpo sIti karzannivAhavanIyaM prati prastaramapAdatte nodyOti na prayOti' (Apa0 SrO0 2385) nodyOti nodyacCati
'agnizwe niSamayatu yadi te mana udyutam' (aTarva0 71112) udyutaM kzuBitaM vihvalaM vyAkulam udyatamiti sAyaRaH paWati grahavikAreRodBrAntamityevaM ca vyAKyAti
'mekzaRena triH pradakziRamudAyOti' (kO0 sU0 211) UrDvamIzanmiSrayatItyAha
'pfTaN mekzaRAByAM pradakziRamudAyuvan' (go0 gf0 414) ukto'rTaH
'strIyoniraBiyuta enAM garBaH' (ni0 219) aBiyuta AmiSrIBUta iti durgaH

'pAdAByAmeva tacCriyaM Siro'ByAyanti…pakzAByAmeva tacCriyaM Siro'ByAyuvate' (E0 brA0 413) aByAyuvate=aByAyuvanti miSrayanti prApnuvantItyarTaH SriyamaBilakzya yatanta iti tu saMskftaSArmaRyakozaH tamimamarTaM DAtvarTo na samarTayate
'prARAnevAsya pratIcaH prati yOti' (tE0 saM0 3485) pratiyOti niyacCati pratiruRadDi prAtikUlyena pravartayatIti tu BawwaBAskaraH

'vizRoH stUpo'sIti karzannivAhavanIyaM prati prastaramapAdatte nodyOti na prayOti na pratiyOti' (Apa0 SrO0 2385) na pratiyOti na paScAtsArayatIti DartasvAmiBAzyam na praticInaM haratIti rudradattaH so'yaM SabdaBedo nArTaBedaH
'pratiyuto varuRasya pASaH' (tE0 saM0 14453) pratiyutaH pratyekaM pfTak kfta iti BawwaBAskaraH tE0 brA0 2664 ityatrApOdaM SrUyate tatra pratiyutastyata iti sAyaRaH
'ayamapItaro yoniretasmAdeva pariyuto Bavati' (ni0 128) pariyutaH parivezwitaH parIto jarAyuReti BAvaH
'…kAYcanaM kalpapAdapam palAdUrDvaM yaTA SaktyA taRqulEstUpasaMyutam' (mAtsya pu0 10150) nArTa upena
